news:news.news:title: Global tensions rise as Trump threatens a blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, while civilian casualties are reported in Nigeria and Haiti.
news:news.news:keywords: Global tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, Civilian casualties in Nigeria, Pope's Africa tour significance, Ceasefire violations between Ukraine and Russia, Tragic events in Haiti

news:news.news:title: The collapse of US-Iran talks raises concerns about rising energy prices and economic uncertainty, while Texas seeks to attract investment with a new London office.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran negotiations impact on oil prices, Texas investment strategies, job market challenges for federal workers, inflation trends in the US, IMF warnings on global economy

news:news.news:title: Rockstar Games downplays the impact of a recent data breach, while Tesla's Full Self-Driving receives regulatory approval in the Netherlands.
news:news.news:keywords: data breach impact on gaming, Tesla Full Self-Driving approval, Nintendo Switch 2 promotional bundle, RGB LED TV technology, Google News content policies

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy won the Masters for the second consecutive year, becoming the first back-to-back champion since Tiger Woods.
news:news.news:keywords: Rory McIlroy Masters victory analysis, NBA playoff predictions, MLB injury updates, NFL draft prospects, Phil Garner's legacy

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into human history, health, and the universe, including Neanderthal interactions and potential cancer treatments.
news:news.news:keywords: Neanderthal cooperation and cultural exchange, Dietary habits and weight management, Airborne toxins and environmental health, Cancer treatment advancements, Universe expansion and Hubble tension

news:news.news:title: Hungarians are voting on whether to end Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule amid ongoing tensions in Ukraine and rising political challenges in Europe.
news:news.news:keywords: Hungary elections 2026, Ukraine Easter truce, Germany far-right politics, California governor race, Iran satellite imagery restrictions

news:news.news:title: US inflation rises sharply amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, impacting various sectors including airlines and government employment.
news:news.news:keywords: US inflation impact on economy, job market challenges for federal workers, corporate responses to social issues

news:news.news:title: The Netherlands becomes the first European country to approve Tesla's supervised Full Self-Driving technology, potentially influencing wider EU adoption.
news:news.news:keywords: Tesla Full Self-Driving approval, Google News Polymarket error, Pokémon Champions launch issues, Google Nest Doorbell sale, AI art in media

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy's dramatic Saturday at the Masters sets up a competitive final round, while UFC and NCAA hockey also saw significant developments.
news:news.news:keywords: Masters Tournament final round preview, UFC event updates, NCAA hockey championship results, MLB player performance analysis, NBA postseason storylines

news:news.news:title: Recent studies reveal new insights into nutrition, cancer treatment, Alzheimer’s detection, and dark matter, highlighting significant advancements in various scientific fields.
news:news.news:keywords: nutrition and weight management, advancements in cancer treatment, Alzheimer's disease detection, dark matter research, superconductivity discoveries

news:news.news:title: Tesla's Full Self-Driving Approved in Netherlands, Paving Way for EU Adoption Amid Inflation Spike
Hungarians Vote on Ending Orbán's 16-Year Rule as Inflation Hits US Markets Hard
